name: Alliance Data (Now Bread Financial Holdings, Inc.)
h1: Bread Financial's GCC footprint in India
lede: Bread Financial runs one capability center in Bengaluru. Bengaluru, covering gcc/gic, built over seven years.
insight: A single Bread Financial center is easy to miss and easier to misread. We track its type, functions and the people who run it, so you can decide if it belongs on your target list.
metaTitle: Bread Financial GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Bread Financial runs 1 verified GCC center in Bengaluru, covering gcc/gic. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Bread Financial's India footprint covers Bengaluru, spanning gcc/gic. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting, Sales & Marketing and Customer Support for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all seven decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Bread Financial operate in India?
faq.a: Bread Financial operates 1 active Global Capability Center site in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Bread Financial have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Bread Financial's India GCC presence is in Bengaluru.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Bread Financial run in India?
faq.a: Bread Financial runs gcc/gic centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Bread Financial's India GCCs?
faq.a: Bread Financial's India centers employ in the 501 to 1,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Bread Financial's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 7 leaders at Bread Financial's India centers, across IT and HR. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
